title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・ゴールはまだ先

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky runs her heart out and secures victory
in the autumn Tenno Sho, delighting spectators
and runners alike.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is overjoyed to have had the
chance to compete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her heart skips a beat when Maruzensky vows to
continue running in order to have more fun races
like this one.
